nasb.text: This poor man cried, and the Lord heard him And saved him out of all his troubles.

esv.text: This poor man cried, and the Lord heard him and saved him out of all his troubles.

cnv.text: 我這困苦人呼求，耶和華就垂聽， 拯救我脫離一切患難。

ccb.text: 我这可怜的人向祂呼求， 祂就垂听， 救我脱离一切困境。

csbs.text: 我这困苦人呼求，耶和华就垂听， 拯救我脱离一切的患难。
